Operation 'createEntry' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Summary is clear and actionable, but description is completely empty. Added details about markdown support, custom URL handling, return values, and publication behavior to help AI agents understand inputs, outputs, and side effects.

data.description_suggestion: Creates a new markdown entry on Rentry. Accepts markdown content and optional custom URL parameter. Returns the created entry object with assigned URL, edit token, and metadata. If no custom URL is provided, a random URL is generated. The entry is immediately published and accessible.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable, but description is completely empty. Added details about markdown support, custom URL handling, return values, and publication behavior to help AI agents understand inputs, outputs, and side effects.

message: Operation 'editEntry' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Summary is adequate, but description is empty. Added critical details about URL-based identification, edit token requirement, request/response structure, and immediate publication to enable proper AI agent usage.

data.description_suggestion: Updates the markdown content of an existing entry identified by its URL. Requires the entry's edit token for authentication. Accepts new markdown content in the request body. Returns the updated entry object with modified content and metadata. Changes are immediately published.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description is empty. Added critical details about URL-based identification, edit token requirement, request/response structure, and immediate publication to enable proper AI agent usage.

message: Operation 'getRawEntry' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Summary is clear and specific, but description is missing. Added details about return format (raw markdown), use cases, and authentication requirements to help AI agents understand when to use this operation versus fetchEntry.

data.current_summary: Get raw markdown text of an entry
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the raw, unrendered markdown content of an entry by its URL. Returns the plain markdown text without HTML rendering or metadata. Useful for editing or exporting entry content. No authentication required for public entries.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and specific, but description is missing. Added details about return format (raw markdown), use cases, and authentication requirements to help AI agents understand when to use this operation versus fetchEntry.

message: Operation 'fetchEntry' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Summary mentions metadata but description is empty. Added details about what metadata is included, return structure, authentication requirements, and differentiation from getRawEntry to improve AI agent decision-making.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves complete entry details by URL including rendered content, metadata, creation/modification timestamps, and other entry information. Returns the full entry object with all available metadata. No authentication required for public entries. Use getRawEntry to retrieve only the raw markdown content.
data.reasoning: Summary mentions metadata but description is empty. Added details about what metadata is included, return structure, authentication requirements, and differentiation from getRawEntry to improve AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'deleteEntry' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Summary is basic but clear. Description is empty and missing critical details about authentication requirements, permanence of deletion, and confirmation response. Added these details to ensure AI agents understand the destructive nature and authentication requirements of this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes an entry identified by its URL. Requires the entry's edit token for authentication. Once deleted, the entry cannot be recovered and the URL becomes available for reuse. Returns a confirmation response indicating successful deletion. This action is irreversible.
data.reasoning: Summary is basic but clear. Description is empty and missing critical details about authentication requirements, permanence of deletion, and confirmation response. Added these details to ensure AI agents understand the destructive nature and authentication requirements of this operation.
